userMessage: Set CH1 to 500mV DC 50ohm, CH2 to 1V AC, set edge trigger on CH1 rising at 0.5V normal mode, run single sequence acquisition, add frequency amplitude and pk2pk measurements on CH1, query all three results, save CH1 waveform as binary and take a screenshot, then disconnect.

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"s1_1","newStep":{"id":"1","type":"write","label":"Configure CH1","params":{"command":"CH1:SCAle 0.5;CH1:COUPling DC;CH1:TERmination 50"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"1","newStep":{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Configure CH2","params":{"command":"CH2:SCAle 1;CH2:COUPling AC"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"2","newStep":{"id":"3","type":"write","label":"Configure trigger","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH1;TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe;TRIGger:A:LEVel:CH1 0.5;TRIGger:A:MODe NORMal"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"3","newStep":{"id":"4","type":"write","label":"Configure acquisition/save","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence;ACQuire:STATE ON"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"4","newStep":{"id":"5","type":"write","label":"Clear existing measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"5","newStep":{"id":"6","type":"group","label":"Add measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"m1","type":"write","label":"Add frequency measurement on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:TYPe FREQUENCY;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"m2","type":"write","label":"Add amplitude measurement on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:TYPe AMPLITUDE;MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"m3","type":"write","label":"Add pk2pk measurement on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS3:TYPe PK2PK;MEASUrement:MEAS3:SOURCE CH1"}}]}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"6","newStep":{"id":"7","type":"group","label":"Read measurement results","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"q1","type":"query","label":"Query frequency result for CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_frequency"}},{"id":"q2","type":"query","label":"Query amplitude result for CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}},{"id":"q3","type":"query","label":"Query pk2pk result for CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS3:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_pk2pk"}}]}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"7","newStep":{"id":"8","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1.bin","format":"bin"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"8","newStep":{"id":"9","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH2 waveform","params":{"source":"CH2","filename":"ch2.bin","format":"bin"}}},{"type":"insert_step_after","targetStepId":"9","newStep":{"id":"10","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}}}]}
